criteria.label: Payoff concreteness
criteria.notes: 1-2pp on standard image benchmarks, zero inference cost, cheapest regularizer per parameter. Loses 1pp because '1-2 percentage points' is rough range without specific benchmark.

criteria.label: Staircase coherence
criteria.notes: Six rungs build cleanly. Minor: forward-pass-effect rung is close to mask-mechanism rung but defensible.

criteria.label: Destination precision
criteria.notes: Names exact formula h_dropped = m * h with m ~ Bernoulli(p), forced redundancy mechanism, weight-scaling correction with 2^N ensemble interpretation.

criteria.label: Narration clarity
criteria.notes: Almost all symbols defined inline. Minor: 'co-adapted' used without explicit definition.

criteria.label: Board specificity
criteria.notes: Loss curves, network, ensemble all specific enough for renderer.

criteria.label: Board coherence
criteria.notes: Highlight/erase targets all previously introduced. Erases at 148-156 clear canvas before test-time section.

criteria.label: Board visual balance
criteria.notes: Three draws plus highlights and writes. Excellent for visual topic.

criteria.label: Math and notation correctness
criteria.notes: Core math correct. ISSUE: fullText says 'scaled by one-over-p' (inverted-dropout convention) before inverted dropout is formally introduced; conflates standard and inverted variants.

criteria.label: Code-content decision
criteria.notes: PyTorch nn.Dropout snippet at t=185 syntactically valid; correctly demonstrates train/eval toggle.

criteria.label: Pacing and density
criteria.notes: Seven beats / 240s averages 34s/beat. Beat at 200s carries inverted dropout AND closing summary.

criteria.label: Redundancy and focus
criteria.notes: Stays focused. Closing summary restates core formula -- appropriate but technically repeats.

topThreeIssues: fullText narration describes 'scaled by one-over-p' (inverted dropout convention) mid-explanation before inverted dropout is introduced -- conflates the two variants
Beat at 200s carries two distinct ideas (inverted dropout + closing summary) in single ~40s beat
summary: Strong plan with precise formulas, well-specified board, coherent staircase. Main weakness is subtle conceptual inconsistency where 1/p activation scaling (inverted dropout) is described before inverted dropout is introduced.
